summary: Completed iteration 2 testing of Sunday School education app enhanced features. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success). Frontend has critical mobile navigation issues and authentication persistence problems affecting course enrollment and calendar view testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Bottom navigation bar not found in mobile viewport (390x844)
Authentication not persisting when navigating between pages - redirects to login

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test enrollment features due to navigation issues preventing access to courses page
Cannot test calendar view toggle due to inability to reach courses page
Cannot test file preview due to navigation issues preventing access to lesson detail pages

passed_tests: Backend API connectivity (27/27 tests passed including new enrollment endpoints)
Dashboard page loads correctly with welcome message
My Courses section displays on dashboard with enrolled courses
Dashboard action buttons present (Join Live, I Attended, View Details)
Animations and loading states working (found animated elements)
Desktop navigation structure (8 navigation items found)
Empty state handling in backend responses
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix mobile bottom navigation implementation - no bottom nav bar found in mobile view. Fix authentication persistence issues preventing navigation between pages. These issues block testing of core iteration 2 features (enrollment, calendar view, file preview).
